narrative:
Madison Township has 2,443 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.0 percentage points.
